title: THRIFT STORE - 211info
text: OREGON COAST HUMANE SOCIETY THRIFT STORE THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a thrift store to raise money to benefit the agency's animal welfare programs. Donations accepted. 1193 Bay Street Florence, OR 97439 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 7 days per week 10am-4pm Email (541) 997-5705 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 997-5705 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information. Call ahead to confirm hours. FEES: Varies by item DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Donation Drop Off Points Thrift Shops If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
